parsed.answer: There is no widely famous person who is FROM (born in) the Galapagos Islands. The person most associated with the islands is Charles Darwin, but he was British and merely visited in 1835 — he was not from there. The Galapagos have a very small permanent population (~30,000), relatively recent settlement, and I am not aware of any globally recognized person born there. The question may rest on a false premise.
